promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the companion overlay-fence reduction because it is the compact canon-side geometry and Axis-3 fence surface that the companion pressures directly.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest manifold, axis, engine, and compliance fence rules in a small high-signal packet.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Earlier A2-mid fence batches were used as anchors so this pass could stay on the parent batch's compact geometry/axis kernel rather than rebuilding nearby topology and overlay packets.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the current geometry/manifold fence packet was reduced into a smaller reusable A2-mid surface.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The canon-geometry parent batch plus the existing A2-mid comparison anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable fence set and preserve the live conflicts for this pass.

candidate_items.name: CONSTRAINT_MANIFOLD_BEFORE_AXES_FOUNDATION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest compact manifold-first rule in the parent batch without importing extra overlay semantics.

candidate_items.name: ADMISSIBILITY_FIRST_COORDINATE_FREE_GEOMETRY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest geometry minimality rule in the parent batch while keeping metric inflation out.

candidate_items.name: AXES_AS_SLICES_NONCARRIER_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest anti-reification move for axis semantics.

candidate_items.name: AXIS3_ENGINE_FAMILY_ONLY_FENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the sharpest canon-side Axis-3 narrowing fence and keeps the nearby overlay conflict explicit.

candidate_items.name: ENGINES_AS_DERIVED_EQUIVALENCE_CLASS_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's compact anti-primitive engine rule without adding extra content.

candidate_items.name: COMPLIANCE_CHECKLIST_REVIEW_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the most reusable downstream artifact in the parent batch by turning its closing fence set into a review gate.

quarantined_items.name: AUTHORITY_LABEL_DIRECT_PROMOTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The in-file authority tag cannot bypass intake-layer proposal handling.

quarantined_items.name: ABSTRACT_MANIFOLD_FOUNDATION_AS_SUFFICIENT_SIM_SUBSTRATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The source provides an abstract semantic foundation, not the concrete running substrate demanded by active-state sim pressure.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS3_FLUX_CHIRALITY_COMPATIBILITY_READ
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The companion-style Axis-3 flux reuse remains in direct semantic conflict with this canon-side fence.

quarantined_items.name: TYPE1_TYPE2_EXTRA_SEMANTICS_REIMPORT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Type-1 and Type-2 remain intentionally semantically narrow in this file.

quarantined_items.name: DERIVED_GEOMETRY_OR_SUBSTRATE_IMPORT_FROM_MINIMAL_FENCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This minimal fence surface does not directly license richer geometry or substrate claims.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest compact geometry, axis, engine, and review fences without rebuilding neighboring packets.
They keep the nearby companion conflict explicit while preserving the canon-side fence set as proposal-side reusable material.
They remain small, source-linked, and noncanon for later comparison work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain authority, compatibility, or substrate overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as explicit risks, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used earlier A2-mid fence packets only as comparison anchors to keep this reduction narrow.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded geometry/manifold fence reduction pass.
